summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Exagram blood exam analysis features. Backend: 26/26 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All tested features working correctly including exam results page with values table, AI chat, and admin coupon management.

working_features: Landing page loads correctly with hero section and 3-step process
Dashboard shows user credits (0) and exam history
Exam summary section with AI-generated warm summary in Portuguese
Values table showing 13 hemogram parameters with values, reference ranges, and Normal/Borderline/Attention flags
Chat interface with exam context - AI responds with contextual answers about blood values
Chat messages are persisted and displayed in conversation history
Quick reply suggestions for common questions
Admin login and dashboard with overview statistics
Admin coupon management (list, create, toggle, delete)
Mercado Pago checkout integration with coupon discounts

passed_tests: POST /api/auth/login - User login with test credentials
GET /api/exams/{exam_id} - Returns exam with extracted_data, flags, summary, messages
Exam has 13 extracted hemogram parameters (hemoglobina, hematocrito, eritrocitos, leucocitos, plaquetas, vcm, hcm, chcm, neutrofilos, linfocitos, eosinofilos, basofilos, monocitos)
Exam has flags for all values (all 'normal' in test exam)
Exam has AI-generated summary (warm, empathetic tone in Portuguese)
Chat returns contextual AI response about exam values
Chat messages are persisted in database
Webhook accepts query parameters (MP IPN format)
GET /api/exams - Returns user's exam list with test exam
POST /api/payments/checkout - Creates Mercado Pago preference without coupon
POST /api/payments/checkout - Creates preference with coupon discount applied
critical_code_review_comments: AI integrations (Gemini for extraction, Claude for analysis) are working correctly with EMERGENT_LLM_KEY
Exam extraction captures 13 hemogram parameters with values, units, and reference ranges
Chat provides contextual, empathetic responses in Portuguese about exam values
Webhook endpoint handles multiple MP notification formats (query params, JSON body)
Frontend exam page URL is /exam/{id} (singular) not /exams/{id} (plural)
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_exam_analysis_chat.py (new test file for exam analysis and chat features)
seed_data_creation: Test exam already exists with 13 hemogram parameters extracted and analyzed
context_for_next_testing_agent: All exam analysis features tested and working. Exam upload uses Gemini for extraction (13 hemogram params) and Claude for analysis (warm summary + flags). Chat provides contextual responses about exam values. Webhook handles MP IPN notifications. Admin coupon CRUD working. Test user has 0 credits (used for exam upload). Existing coupons: TESTE10 (10%), BEMVINDO20 (20%), UITEST20 (20%).

mercado_pago_webhook.details: Accepts POST with JSON body and query params, handles payment notifications, HMAC validation implemented

exam_upload_ai_extraction.details: Gemini extracts 13 hemogram parameters with values, units, reference ranges from uploaded images

exam_ai_analysis.details: Claude generates warm summary in Portuguese, classifies values as normal/borderline/attention

exam_results_page.details: Displays summary, values table with flags, chat interface with conversation history

chat_with_exam_context.details: AI responds with contextual answers about user's specific exam values, messages persisted

user_credits_deduction.details: Test user started with 1 credit, now has 0 after exam upload

admin_coupon_crud.details: List, create, toggle active, delete coupons via admin dashboard

gemini.purpose: Extract hemogram values from uploaded images/PDFs

claude.purpose: Generate warm summary and classify values, power chat responses
